documents.content:
Olyxee Product Document 
1. Company Overview 
Olyxee is building AI research and infrastructure for business systems 
that help organizations get real value from AI. 
Olyxee does not focus on building foundation AI models. Instead, Olyxee 
researches real problems created by AI adoption and builds practical 
infrastructure that helps businesses use AI reliably, efficiently, and 
profitably. 
The company focuses on business systems where AI can improve 
execution, financial accuracy, document integrity, operational visibility, 
and cost control. 
2. Company Thesis 
As organizations adopt AI, the biggest challenge is not only access to AI 
models. The real challenge is turning AI into reliable business value. 
Businesses need systems that can: 
• verify data before decisions are made 
• execute workflows safely 
• validate documents before they enter operations 
• reduce wasted AI usage 
• measure whether AI is creating real return on investment 
• connect AI outputs to business actions 
Olyxee builds the infrastructure that helps organizations move from AI 
experimentation to practical AI execution. 
3. Product Portfolio 
Olyxee’s product structure is divided into core products, solutions, and 
internal layers. 
Core Products 
1. Addup 

2. Ordo 
3. Togent 
Solutions and Modules 
1. Courier Loop 
2. Olyxee Document Integrity (ODI) 
Internal Layer 
1. Cortex 
Cortex is not a standalone product. It is the internal intelligence layer 
that powers Ordo. 
4. Product Map 
Name Type Role

5. Core Products 
5.1 Addup 
Product Category 
Financial reconciliation and integrity engine. 

Purpose 
Addup helps businesses reconcile financial records, detect mismatches, 
and verify financial data accuracy. 
Problem 
Finance teams often work with inconsistent financial records across 
bank statements, ledgers, invoices, receipts, and reports. 
Common problems include: 
• unmatched transactions 
• duplicate transactions 
• partial payments 
• missing entries 
• incorrect references 
• bank fees not recorded 
• interest entries not recognized 
• reversal mismatches 
• extraction errors from financial documents 
These problems affect financial reporting, decision-making, and trust in 
business data. 
Solution 
Addup provides a reconciliation and financial integrity engine that 
compares financial records, identifies differences, explains mismatches, 
and helps teams produce accurate reconciliation outputs. 
Core Capabilities 
• Bank vs ledger reconciliation 
• Duplicate transaction detection 
• Unmatched transaction detection 
• Partial payment detection 
• Reversal detection 

• Bank fee recognition 
• Interest entry recognition 
• Reference mismatch detection 
• Confidence scoring 
• Reconciliation adjustment suggestions 
• Financial integrity reports 
• Review workflow for finance teams 
Target Users 
• Finance teams 
• Accountants 
• SMEs 
• Financial managers 
• Audit support teams 
• Businesses handling regular transaction reconciliation 
Product Direction 
Addup should remain focused on accuracy before speed. 
The product must prove that it can detect financial issues reliably and 
produce reconciliation results that can be compared against a manual 
accountant benchmark. 
Roadmap Focus 
• Improve reconciliation accuracy 
• Strengthen validation rules 
• Expand test datasets 
• Compare Addup output with manual accountant results 
• Improve document and CSV upload flows 
• Add review dashboard 
• Add exportable reconciliation reports 

• Prepare finance-team demos 
5.2 Ordo 
Product Category 
AI business workflow execution system. 
Purpose 
Ordo helps businesses execute workflows end-to-end across 
documents, systems, APIs, databases, and human approvals. 
Problem 
Many businesses use AI to generate answers, summaries, or 
recommendations, but still struggle to turn those outputs into completed 
operational work. 
The gap is execution. 
Businesses need AI systems that can: 
• understand workflow intent 
• break work into steps 
• call business systems 
• apply rules 
• route approvals 
• track status 
• handle failures 
• produce auditable outputs 
Solution 
Ordo is an AI workflow execution system that turns business instructions 
into structured, trackable, and completed operational actions. 
Ordo does not only answer. It acts within controlled business workflows. 
Core Capabilities 
• Workflow automation 

• Multi-step business process execution 
• Task creation and routing 
• API actions 
• Database read/write actions 
• Human-in-the-loop approvals 
• Escalation handling 
• Workflow status tracking 
• Failure handling 
• Structured output generation 
• Audit logs 
• Business process reporting 
Cortex Inside Ordo 
Cortex is the internal intelligence layer inside Ordo. 
Cortex helps Ordo understand: 
• business documents 
• policies 
• workflow instructions 
• company knowledge 
• business rules 
• operational context 
• user intent 
Ordo executes. Cortex understands. 
Cortex should not be sold as a standalone product at this stage. It 
should be positioned as the intelligence layer that powers Ordo. 
Target Users 
• Operations teams 

• Workflow-heavy businesses 
• Compliance teams 
• Internal process teams 
• Logistics teams 
• Businesses with manual approval and execution processes 
• Companies that need AI connected to real business actions 
Product Direction 
Ordo should become Olyxee’s main workflow execution infrastructure. 
It should support both general business workflows and vertical solutions 
such as Courier Loop. 
Roadmap Focus 
• Finalize backend execution architecture 
• Standardize JSON job payloads 
• Add job status management 
• Add task splitting and step ordering 
• Add approval workflows 
• Add audit logs 
• Add failure handling 
• Connect ODI for document-triggered workflows 
• Build admin dashboard 
• Prepare business workflow demos 
5.3 Togent 
Product Category 
AI-agent cost-control and context optimization layer. 
Purpose 

Togent helps engineering teams reduce AI-agent costs by controlling 
context, tracking usage, and preventing repeated work across AI coding 
tools. 
Problem 
As companies adopt AI coding agents, the cost of AI development can 
grow through: 
• token usage 
• subscriptions 
• agent runs 
• repeated context loading 
• failed agent attempts 
• duplicated work 
• poor project memory 
• lack of visibility into AI usage 
• weak measurement of AI development ROI 
AI coding tools are powerful, but they often make developers re-explain 
the same codebase, architecture, bugs, and decisions repeatedly. 
Solution 
Togent gives engineering teams visibility and control over AI coding-
agent usage. 
It helps teams preserve reusable project context, track AI-agent 
sessions, detect repeated work, and reduce wasted AI usage. 
Core Capabilities 
• AI-agent usage tracking 
• Token and context cost visibility 
• Repo memory 
• AI coding session history 
• Repeated work detection 

• Context optimization 
• Context packs for AI coding tools 
• AI coding ROI reporting 
• Cost dashboards for engineering teams 
Supported Tool Direction 
Togent should support workflows around tools such as: 
• Cursor 
• Claude Code 
• OpenAI Codex 
• Replit 
• GitHub Copilot 
• Windsurf 
• other AI coding agents 
Product Positioning 
Togent is not another coding assistant. 
Togent is the cost-control and context-memory layer around AI coding 
agents. 
Tagline 
Stop paying agents to relearn your codebase. 
Target Users 
• Engineering teams 
• CTOs 
• AI-heavy startups 
• Developer teams using Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Replit, or 
Copilot 
• Platform engineering teams 
• Companies monitoring AI development spend 

Product Direction 
Togent should start as a focused tool for AI coding-agent cost and 
context visibility. 
The first version should not be a full enterprise governance platform. It 
should prove the pain around repeated context, poor memory, and rising 
AI-agent usage costs. 
Roadmap Focus 
• Continue competitor and market research 
• Interview developers and engineering managers 
• Build CLI or VS Code/Cursor extension prototype 
• Add repo memory 
• Add session summaries 
• Add context-pack generation 
• Add basic cost and token visibility 
• Test internally on Olyxee repositories 
• Package for early engineering teams 
6. Solutions and Modules 
6.1 Courier Loop 
Product Category 
Logistics workflow solution. 
Purpose 
Courier Loop helps logistics and courier teams manage operational 
workflows, delivery visibility, and communication. 
Relationship to Ordo 
Courier Loop should be positioned as a logistics solution powered by 
Ordo. 
Ordo provides the workflow execution engine. Courier Loop applies that 
engine to logistics and courier operations. 

Problem 
Logistics teams often deal with: 
• fragmented communication 
• manual delivery tracking 
• unclear task ownership 
• poor operational visibility 
• disconnected systems 
• weak exception handling 
• delays in status updates 
Solution 
Courier Loop provides workflow structure and operational visibility for 
courier and logistics processes. 
Core Capabilities 
• Delivery workflow tracking 
• Courier task management 
• Operational visibility 
• Delivery status updates 
• Exception handling 
• Client/vendor communication support 
• Logistics process automation 
Target Users 
• Courier companies 
• Logistics operators 
• Dispatch teams 
• Operations managers 
• Delivery-focused businesses 

Product Direction 
Courier Loop should not be treated as a separate core platform for now. 
It should be packaged as a vertical solution powered by Ordo. 
Roadmap Focus 
• Define core logistics workflows 
• Build delivery status flow 
• Add task assignment and tracking 
• Add exception handling 
• Add communication templates 
• Connect to Ordo execution engine 
• Prepare logistics demo 
6.2 Olyxee Document Integrity 
Short Name 
ODI 
Product Category 
Document integrity and validation layer. 
Purpose 
ODI helps businesses extract, validate, and trust document data before 
it enters financial, compliance, or operational workflows. 
Problem 
Business workflows often depend on documents such as: 
• invoices 
• bank statements 
• receipts 
• delivery notes 
• contracts 

• certificates 
• purchase orders 
• compliance documents 
• company registration documents 
AI extraction can produce incorrect, incomplete, or inconsistent data. If 
bad document data enters a workflow, the final business decision or 
action can become wrong. 
Solution 
ODI validates documents before they are used by Olyxee systems or 
client workflows. 
It checks whether a document is complete, consistent, structured, and 
safe to use. 
Core Capabilities 
• Document extraction 
• Field validation 
• Missing-field detection 
• Duplicate document detection 
• Consistency checks 
• Expiry checks 
• Rule-based document validation 
• Workflow readiness scoring 
• Structured document output 
• Document issue reporting 
Used By 
ODI supports: 
• Addup for financial documents 
• Ordo for document-triggered workflows 

• Courier Loop for logistics documents 
Product Direction 
ODI should be offered as a module/API, not as a separate core product 
at this stage. 
It should strengthen Addup and Ordo by ensuring documents are 
validated before they trigger financial or operational decisions. 
Roadmap Focus 
• Define first supported document types 
• Build extraction and validation pipeline 
• Add confidence scoring 
• Add field-level issue reporting 
• Add validation API 
• Add dashboard for document review 
• Integrate ODI into Addup and Ordo 
7. Internal Layer 
7.1 Cortex 
Product Category 
Internal intelligence and reasoning layer. 
Purpose 
Cortex powers intelligence inside Ordo. 
It helps Ordo understand documents, business rules, company 
knowledge, policies, and workflow intent. 
Status 
Cortex is not a standalone product. 
It is an internal layer inside Ordo. 
Core Capabilities 
• Document reasoning 

• Business rule understanding 
• Knowledge retrieval 
• Decision support 
• Workflow planning 
• Context interpretation 
• Policy understanding 
• Structured reasoning outputs 
Product Direction 
Cortex should remain internal until there is a clear market need to 
expose it separately. 
For now, the clearest positioning is: 
Ordo is the product. Cortex is the intelligence inside Ordo. 
8. Product Architecture 
Olyxee’s product architecture should be understood as follows: 
Research Layer 
Olyxee Research identifies real AI failure points and business 
infrastructure gaps. 
Research areas include: 
• AI-agent cost and token waste 
• financial document integrity 
• reconciliation accuracy 
• silent extraction corruption 
• workflow execution reliability 
• document validation 
• enterprise AI ROI 
Infrastructure Layer 
Olyxee Infrastructure turns research into products and modules. 

This includes: 
• Addup 
• Ordo 
• Togent 
• ODI 
• Courier Loop 
• Cortex inside Ordo 
Product Layer 
Olyxee packages the infrastructure into usable products and solutions 
for businesses. 
9. Research-to-Product Pipeline 
Olyxee should follow this product development path: 
Research → Prototype → Module → Product → Client Deployment 
Example: Addup 
Research: 
Financial reconciliation accuracy and data integrity. 
Prototype: 
Reconciliation engine and test datasets. 
Product: 
Addup. 
Example: Ordo 
Research: 
How AI can safely execute business workflows. 
Prototype: 
Workflow execution engine with structured JSON jobs. 
Product: 
Ordo. 
Example: Togent 

Research: 
AI-agent token waste, context loss, and cost control. 
Prototype: 
CLI or extension for tracking context and agent sessions. 
Product: 
Togent. 
Example: ODI 
Research: 
Document extraction errors and document integrity. 
Prototype: 
Document validation API. 
Module: 
ODI inside Addup and Ordo. 
10. Product Priorities 
Immediate Priority 
1. Addup 
Improve reconciliation accuracy and prepare finance demos. 
2. Ordo 
Finalize workflow execution architecture and prepare business 
workflow demos. 
3. ODI 
Build document validation flow that supports Addup and Ordo. 
Research Priority 
4. Togent 
Continue validation, competitor research, and MVP design. 
Supporting Priority 
5. Courier Loop 
Keep as logistics solution powered by Ordo. 
6. Cortex 
Keep as internal intelligence layer inside Ordo. 

11. Roadmap Phases 
Phase 1: Product Clarity 
Goal 
Clarify the product structure and remove overlap. 
Actions 
• Confirm Addup, Ordo, and Togent as core products 
• Position Courier Loop as a logistics solution powered by Ordo 
• Position ODI as a document integrity module/API 
• Remove Olyxee Cortex as a standalone product 
• Define Cortex as the intelligence layer inside Ordo 
• Update internal team documents with this structure 
Phase 2: Internal Foundations 
Goal 
Build reliable internal product foundations. 
Actions 
• Strengthen Addup reconciliation engine 
• Finalize Ordo job execution flow 
• Define ODI validation pipeline 
• Define Cortex reasoning outputs inside Ordo 
• Continue Togent research and MVP planning 
• Use internal Olyxee projects as test environments 
Phase 3: Demo-Ready Systems 
Goal 
Prepare products and modules for demos. 
Actions 
• Build Addup reconciliation demo 

• Build Ordo workflow execution demo 
• Build ODI document validation demo 
• Build Courier Loop logistics workflow demo 
• Build Togent prototype for AI-agent cost and context tracking 
• Create demo scripts and test scenarios 
Phase 4: Market Validation 
Goal 
Test products with real users and buyers. 
Actions 
• Test Addup with finance and accounting users 
• Test Ordo with operations-heavy businesses 
• Test ODI with document-heavy teams 
• Test Courier Loop with logistics users 
• Test Togent with developers and engineering teams 
• Collect feedback on usefulness, accuracy, urgency, and 
willingness to pay 
Phase 5: Commercial Packaging 
Goal 
Turn validated systems into sellable products and solutions. 
Actions 
• Package Addup for finance teams 
• Package Ordo for operations teams 
• Package ODI as document integrity API/module 
• Package Courier Loop as logistics solution powered by Ordo 
• Package Togent for engineering teams using AI coding tools 
• Define onboarding, pricing, support, and deployment options 

12. Public Product Structure 
Olyxee should publicly communicate the portfolio as: 
Core Products 
1. Addup 
Financial reconciliation and integrity. 
2. Ordo 
AI business workflow execution. 
3. Togent 
AI-agent cost control and context optimization. 
Solutions / Modules 
1. Courier Loop 
Logistics workflow solution powered by Ordo. 
2. ODI 
Document integrity layer used by Addup and Ordo. 
Internal Layer 
1. Cortex 
Intelligence layer inside Ordo. 
13. Final Summary 
Olyxee is building AI research and infrastructure for business systems 
that help organizations get real value from AI. 
The company should move forward with three core products: 
1. Addup 
2. Ordo 
3. Togent 
And two supporting solutions/modules: 
1. Courier Loop 
2. ODI 

Cortex should be removed as a standalone product and kept as the 
internal intelligence layer inside Ordo. 
This keeps the company focused while still allowing Olyxee Research to 
explore technical problems and turn validated opportunities into 
infrastructure products.
